purpose: Convert AMOS from static/sample-data Alpha into a usable real-data-ready personal market operating system.

current_state.bottleneck: Real data input and repeatable daily workflow.

phases.title: Manual Data Alpha
phases.goal: Make AMOS usable with manually entered daily data for priority tickers.
phases.why: Fastest path to usefulness without waiting for API automation.
deliverables: Daily Brief generated from manually updated score packet
success_criteria: User can update 5-10 fields per ticker and get a coherent Daily Brief.
AMOS can distinguish Hold / Wait / Trim Watch / Build Watch from manual inputs.
Every action output includes evidence, counter-evidence and invalidation.

phases.title: Semi-automated Data Alpha
phases.goal: Allow CSV/JSON imports from charting/broker/research tools.
phases.why: Reduce manual burden while keeping control and transparency.
success_criteria: Imported technical data updates stock pages and dashboard.
Conflicting manual vs imported values are visible, not hidden.

phases.title: Real-time / API-ready Alpha
phases.goal: Prepare AMOS to connect to live market/fundamental/options/event APIs.
phases.why: Daily use needs freshness, but API data must enter through controlled adapters.
success_criteria: Daily Brief can regenerate from fresh data packets.
Stock pages update key scores automatically.
Decision confidence is capped when required fields are stale/missing.

phases.title: Review & Learning Alpha
phases.why: AMOS should improve by testing which signals worked for which stock personality.
success_criteria: Each major decision can be reviewed later.
System learns which indicators work better for CRDO vs HOOD vs IREN etc.
User behavior risk is tracked without moralizing or generic warnings.

next_immediate_builds: AMOS Manual Data Input Sheet v0.1
Daily Brief Generator from Manual Packet v0.2
guardrails: Do not expand new modules before v0.3A manual workflow is usable.
Do not pretend sample data is live data.
Do not output action without invalidation conditions.
Do not let Gann alone trigger buy/sell.
Do not let user observation replace market evidence.
